name: SBI BPCL Octane Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹4,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 25X Reward Points on BPCL fuel station purchases (25 RP per ₹100)
10X Reward Points on dining transactions (10 RP per ₹100)
10X Reward Points on grocery store purchases (10 RP per ₹100)
10X Reward Points on movie ticket purchases (10 RP per ₹100)
1 Reward Point per ₹100 on all other transactions

redemptionOptions: Gift vouchers from SBI Card catalogue

welcomeBenefits.condition: On spending ₹2,000 within 30 days of card issuance

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver + 5,000 bonus Reward Points

additionalBenefits: 25X rewards on BPCL fuel — one of the highest fuel reward rates
Fuel surcharge waiver saves additional money at the pump
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
EMI conversion facility on large purchases
pros: 25X rewards on BPCL fuel gives an effective 6.25% return — best in class for fuel
10X rewards on dining, grocery, and movies cover everyday categories well
4 domestic lounge visits add travel value
Welcome benefit of 2,000 RP partially offsets the joining fee
cons: ₹1,499 annual fee with ₹4 lakh waiver threshold is steep for a mid-tier card
Fuel rewards only applicable at BPCL stations, not all fuel pumps
Base earn rate of 1 RP/₹100 is poor on non-bonus categories
idealFor: Users who fuel up regularly at BPCL stations and want maximum fuel rewards
Drivers with high monthly fuel spends looking for a dedicated fuel card
Those who want combined fuel + dining + grocery rewards in one card

faqs.question: How much can I save on fuel with this card?
faqs.answer: With 25X Reward Points on BPCL fuel (worth 6.25% back) plus the 1% fuel surcharge waiver, you can effectively save over 7% on every BPCL fuel purchase.

faqs.question: Do I earn rewards at non-BPCL fuel stations?
faqs.answer: The 25X accelerated rate is exclusive to BPCL fuel stations. Non-BPCL fuel stations earn the base rate of 1 RP per ₹100, and fuel surcharge waiver applies across all fuel stations.

faqs.question: What is the annual fee waiver condition?
faqs.answer: The ₹1,499 annual fee is waived if your total annual spends exceed ₹4,00,000 in the previous year.

faqs.question: Can I redeem Reward Points for fuel purchases?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can redeem accumulated Reward Points for BPCL fuel purchases, statement credits, gift vouchers, or Amazon Pay balance.
